guide.title: Suno a w…îde kyere ns…õm gu kas…õt so akwankyer…õ
guide.subtitle: S…õnea w…îkyere nne ne guitar gye a …õma wonya nea eye sen biara.
guide.intro: Suno y…õ adwuma yiye w…î ns…õm a …õho tew a emu nna h…î a w…îde gyina h…î ma so. Saa akwankyer…õ yi fa ahosiesie, botae…õ dodo…î, ne simma 3‚Äì5 a w…îde kyere ns…õm gu kas…õt so ho as…õm.

prep.title: Ahosiesie a w…îy…õ
prep.body: Kyer…õw w…î dan a w…îay…õ ho adwuma anaa nea nne…õma a …õy…õ mmer…õw pii wom mu (ntama, ntama, ntade a …õw…î …îdan a w…îde nne…õma gu mu). Dum fans ne biribiara a …õy…õ dede. Ma wo nne y…õ hyew simma 5 ansa na woakyere agu hama so.

levels.title: Nne…õma a …õw…î soro: -12 kosi -6 dBFS
levels.body: Fa w‚Äôani si so s…õ wob…õma peaks a …õw…î -12 ne -6 dBFS ntam w…î mita no so. W…î saa kwan no ase no, dede a …õw…î akyi no y…õ nea wotumi hu k…õse; w…î n‚Äôatifi no, asiane a …õw…î h…î s…õ wobetwitwa nne…õma no k…î soro. Fa mita a …õw…î Record krataafa no so no hyehy…õ wo mfaso ansa na woafi ase.

distance.title: Mic kwan tenten: 15‚Äì30 cm
distance.body: Tena baabi a …õne afiri a w…îde kasa no ntam kwan y…õ s…õntimita 15 kosi 30. Nea …õb…õn sen saa no ma plosives ne proximity effect y…õ k…õse; akyirikyiri no gye dan mu reverb ne dede pii.

expectations.title: Nea Suno hw…õ kwan
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dry (reverb anaa nsunsuanso biara nni h…î), simma 3 kosi 5 a w…îde kyer…õw. Simma 2 a …õho tew sen biara na …õy…õ ananmusifo sen biara w…î fa no mu no taa ma nea eye sen biara ba.

suno_voice_full.name: Vocal script a edi m≈© ma Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Simma 5 a w…îkyer…õ kwan: …îhyew, …õnne nnyigyei, nsenia, nnwom abien a w…îatwe afi mu, aho…îden, ne kasasin a w…îka.

step.warmup_inst: Fa yawns, anofafa trills (brrr), ne hum a …õy…õ br…õoo b…õy…õ simma biako gyae wo ho. ∆êho nhia s…õ wob…õkyere ‚Äî …õy…õ s…õ wob…õma wo menewa ay…õ mmer…õw ansa na woato dwom k…õk…õ.
step.vowels_inst: Kura …õnne nnyigyei biara ‚Äî a, e, i, o, u ‚Äî simma 3 kosi 4 w…î wo nne a …õy…õ f…õ mu, a …õnne nne a …õy…õ pintinn. Eyi boa Suno ma …îfa wo nne a …õy…õ kronkron no.
step.scales_inst: To scale a …õny…õ den k…î soro na afei to fam, w…î "la" anaa "na" so. ∆êho nhia s…õ …õy…õ p…õp…õ…õp…õ ‚Äî botae no ne s…õ wob…õma wo nne dodow ay…õ map.
step.section_inst: To dwom no mu 8 kosi 16, na fa adwene ankasa a wop…õ s…õ woda no adi. Fa pefeey…õ ne baabi a …õw…î h…î di kan sen mfiridwuma mu p…õy…õ.
step.section2_inst: To dwom foforo 8 kosi 16 bars ‚Äî s…õnea …õb…õy…õ yiye no, chorus anaa …îf√£ a …õne nea atwam no b…î abira. Nne…õma ahorow pii boa model no ma osua wo nne.
step.dynamics_inst: To kasasin koro no ara fi ase br…õoo yiye na ba awiei denneennen, a worenhy…õ wo menewa mu den. Eyi kyer…õ Suno wo nne a …õy…õ nnam.
step.spoken_inst: Kasa ‚Äî nnto dwom ‚Äî kasasin tiawa, ab…îde mu kasasin, te s…õ nea woreb…î nk…îmm…î. Eyi boa Suno ma ohu wo nne no nne ankasa.
